title: The weighted two-cell P0 projection satisfies a Pythagorean identity

source.notes: Generated from checked Lean ground truth; source repository withheld during public release.

informal.statement: For nonzero total mass, the weighted squared L2 energy splits into projected energy plus weighted residual energy.
assumptions: the weighted projection is the weighted average on both cells
the weighted energy uses masses m0 and m1
informal.expected_conclusion: Original weighted energy equals projected weighted energy plus weighted residual energy.

declarations.name: weightedP0Projection2_pythagorean
declarations.statement: theorem weightedP0Projection2_pythagorean (m0 m1 u0 u1 : Real) (hsum : m0 + m1 ≠ 0) : weightedCellL2Sq2 m0 m1 u0 u1 = weightedCellL2Sq2 m0 m1 (weightedP0Projection2Left m0 m1 u0 u1) (weightedP0Projection2Right m0 m1 u0 u1) + weightedP0ProjectionResidualSq2 m0 m1 u0 u1

tasks.input: Translate the weighted Pythagorean energy identity for a two-cell P0 projection into Lean 4.
tasks.target: theorem weightedP0Projection2_pythagorean (m0 m1 u0 u1 : Real) (hsum : m0 + m1 ≠ 0) : weightedCellL2Sq2 m0 m1 u0 u1 = weightedCellL2Sq2 m0 m1 (weightedP0Projection2Left m0 m1 u0 u1) (weightedP0Projection2Right m0 m1 u0 u1) + weightedP0ProjectionResidualSq2 m0 m1 u0 u1

tasks.input: Complete the Lean proof by unfolding the weighted energy, weighted projection, residual, and average.
tasks.target: Unfold weightedCellL2Sq2, weightedP0Projection2Left, weightedP0Projection2Right, weightedP0ProjectionResidualSq2, and weightedCellAverage2; use field_simp with hsum and ring.
